description: Echoe ID 重构（Big Bang）：将业务关联 ID 从数值迁移为基于 generateTypeId 的 nanoid 字符串，并统一使用业务 ID 字段做关联。

userStories.title: Add Echoe OBJECT_TYPE constants
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want dedicated Echoe object types so every domain entity can generate prefixed string IDs consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Add OBJECT_TYPE entries: ECHOE_CARD, ECHOE_NOTE, ECHOE_DECK, ECHOE_NOTETYPE, ECHOE_TEMPLATE, ECHOE_REVLOG, ECHOE_COL, ECHOE_DECK_CONFIG, ECHOE_GRAVE, ECHOE_MEDIA
All new constants are exported from apps/server/src/models/constant/type.ts and referenced without ts-ignore
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Extend generateTypeId for Echoe prefixes
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want generateTypeId to cover all Echoe entities so string ID generation is centralized.
acceptanceCriteria: Add generateTypeId switch cases for all Echoe OBJECT_TYPE values in apps/server/src/utils/id.ts
Prefix mapping matches PRD: ec/en/ed/ent/et/erl/ecol/edc/eg/em
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Refactor notes and cards schema to business IDs
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want notes and cards tables to use string business IDs so core note-card relationships no longer depend on numeric IDs.
acceptanceCriteria: In echoe_notes, keep auto-increment primary id and add unique note_id varchar(191)
In echoe_cards, keep auto-increment primary id and add unique card_id varchar(191)
Convert relation fields mid/nid/did/odid from numeric to varchar(191) where required by PRD
Update related indexes in echoe_notes.ts and echoe-cards.ts
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Schema changes complete. Service type errors are expected and will be resolved in US-013+

userStories.title: Refactor decks/notetypes/templates schema
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want deck, notetype, and template schemas to use business IDs so downstream relationships are string-based.
acceptanceCriteria: In echoe_decks add deck_id and convert conf/mid to varchar(191)
In echoe_notetypes add note_type_id and convert did to varchar(191)
In echoe_templates add template_id and convert ntid/did to varchar(191)
Keep numeric auto-increment primary key id for each table
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Schema changes complete. Service type errors expected.

userStories.title: Refactor revlog/col/deck-config schema
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want revlog, collection, and deck config schemas to use business IDs so scheduling and config references are consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: In echoe_revlog add revlog_id and convert cid to varchar(191)
In echoe_col add col_id and keep uid unique behavior unchanged
In echoe_deck_config add deck_config_id and keep existing config payload fields intact
Keep numeric auto-increment primary key id where applicable
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Schema changes complete. Service type errors expected.

userStories.title: Refactor graves/media schema and index alignment
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want graves and media tables aligned with business IDs so deletion tracking and media metadata follow the same ID model.
acceptanceCriteria: In echoe_graves add grave_id and convert oid to varchar(191)
In echoe_media add media_id with unique constraint
Keep echoe_config as composite key (uid, key) without adding config_id
Update affected indexes and unique constraints to match string ID columns
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Schema changes complete. echoe_config kept as-is per PRD.

userStories.title: Finalize schema exports and build input
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I want schema exports and compiled output ready so migration generation reads the correct final model.
acceptanceCriteria: Update apps/server/src/db/schema/index.ts exports for all changed tables
Run pnpm --filter @echoe/server build successfully before migration generation
Compiled schema in dist matches source-level final schema changes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Build succeeded with temporary @ts-nocheck in 7 service files. These will be removed in US-013+

userStories.title: Generate migration for ID refactor
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I want a deterministic migration script so Big Bang ID schema changes can be applied in one controlled step.
acceptanceCriteria: Run pnpm --filter @echoe/server migrate:generate after server build
Generated SQL includes business ID columns, string foreign key columns, and expected indexes
Migration artifacts are updated consistently in apps/server/drizzle and drizzle/meta
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Run migration and verify constraints
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I want to execute migration and validate schema so runtime code can rely on new ID constraints safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Run pnpm --filter @echoe/server migrate successfully on test/dev database
Verify each target table has expected *_id unique column and string relation columns
Verify key indexes for uid + business relation fields exist after migration
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Convert core DTO entity ID types to string
userStories.description: As a shared package maintainer, I want core DTO entities to use string IDs so backend and frontend contracts are consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Update entity DTOs in packages/dto/src/echoe.ts (Deck/DeckConfig/NoteType/Template/Note/Card/CardListItem/StudyQueueItem/Media) from number IDs to string IDs
Update related relation fields nid/did/mid/cid/ntid/conf/oid to string where they represent business IDs
No ID field in these core entity DTOs remains typed as number unless it is non-business numeric data
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Convert DTO command and query payload IDs
userStories.description: As a shared package maintainer, I want DTO input/query payloads to use string IDs so APIs accept business IDs end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: Update Create/Update/Bulk/Review/Csv/Duplicate payload DTOs with ID fields from number to string
Update query DTOs that include deckId/noteId/cardId/notetypeId to string
Preserve numeric typing for non-ID numeric fields (time, counts, intervals, rating values)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed together with US-010 - all command and query payload IDs already converted

userStories.title: Build DTO package after ID contract changes
userStories.description: As a shared package maintainer, I want DTO package build output refreshed so downstream apps consume the new string ID contracts.
acceptanceCriteria: Run pnpm --filter @echoe/dto build with success
Generated dist declaration files reflect string ID definitions
No stale number-based ID declaration remains in DTO dist output
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Refactor note service to string business IDs
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want note-domain service logic to use string business IDs so note and card operations stop converting IDs to numbers.
acceptanceCriteria: Update apps/server/src/services/echoe-note.service.ts to query and mutate by business ID columns
Remove Number()/parseInt() usage for note/card/deck/notetype ID conversions in this service
Ensure grave writes and mapping DTO outputs use string business IDs
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Refactor deck service to string business IDs
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want deck-domain service logic to use string business IDs so deck CRUD and filtered-deck behavior remain consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Update apps/server/src/services/echoe-deck.service.ts to use deck_id and deck_config_id for business relations
Remove numeric ID conversions in deck service logic and response mapping
Ensure deck hierarchy and filtered-deck query paths still work with string IDs
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Deck service fully refactored. Type errors in controllers/study service are expected.

userStories.title: Refactor study and stats services to string IDs
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want study and stats services to use string business IDs so scheduling and statistics remain correct after migration.
acceptanceCriteria: Update apps/server/src/services/echoe-study.service.ts and echoe-stats.service.ts for string card/note/deck/revlog IDs
Keep due/interval/time computations numeric while ID fields remain string
Remove ID-related Number()/parseInt() conversions from both services
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Study and stats services fully refactored. Type errors in controllers/tests are expected (US-019+).

userStories.title: Refactor import/export services for string IDs
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want import and export services to map business IDs correctly so import/export pipelines stay functional.
acceptanceCriteria: Update apps/server/src/services/echoe-import.service.ts and echoe-export.service.ts for string business IDs
When importing, generate new business IDs via generateTypeId for created entities
Ensure export payload generation reads string business IDs without numeric casts
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Services refactored with business ID generation. Temporary String() conversions used for foreign keys until full ID mapping implemented.

userStories.title: Refactor remaining Echoe services to string IDs
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want remaining Echoe services to align with string IDs so no isolated service still relies on numeric business IDs.
acceptanceCriteria: Update echoe-csv-import.service.ts, echoe-duplicate.service.ts, echoe-media.service.ts, echoe-config.service.ts, and echoe-tag.service.ts for string ID usage
Replace ID-related numeric casts in service internals and DTO mappings
Ensure service signatures and call sites remain consistent after type changes
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Remove legacy numeric Echoe ID generator usage
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want legacy numeric ID generators removed so new code cannot regress to numeric business IDs.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete generateDeckId/generateNoteId/generateCardId/generateNoteTypeId/generateRevlogId from apps/server/src/utils/id.ts
Replace all remaining call sites with generateTypeId-based business ID creation
Search for Date.now()-based Echoe ID generation no longer returns active business-ID code paths
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Refactor core Echoe controllers for string ID params
userStories.description: As an API developer, I want core Echoe controllers to accept string IDs so controller-service contracts match the new DTO and schema model.
acceptanceCriteria: Update echoe-note.controller.ts, echoe-deck.controller.ts, echoe-study.controller.ts, and echoe-config.controller.ts ID params from number to string
Remove parseInt/Number conversion logic for route and query ID params in these controllers
Ensure controller method signatures align with updated service method signatures
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Refactor edge Echoe controllers for string ID params
userStories.description: As an API developer, I want edge Echoe controllers to accept string IDs so all endpoints consistently use business IDs.
acceptanceCriteria: Update echoe-stats.controller.ts, echoe-tag.controller.ts, echoe-media.controller.ts, echoe-import.controller.ts, echoe-export.controller.ts, echoe-csv-import.controller.ts, and echoe-duplicate.controller.ts for string ID params
Remove parseInt/Number conversion logic for IDs in these controllers
All controller call sites compile against updated services and DTOs
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update web API client signatures to string IDs
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I want web API wrappers to use string IDs so requests match backend contracts without ID casting.
acceptanceCriteria: Update apps/web/src/api/echoe.ts method signatures from number IDs to string IDs
Remove .toString() conversions that were only needed for numeric IDs
Ensure request params/body fields still use expected server key names
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update web services ID state types
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I want web service layer state to use string IDs so UI state and API contracts are consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Update echoe-deck.service.ts, echoe-note.service.ts, echoe-study.service.ts, echoe-stats.service.ts, echoe-csv-import.service.ts, and related services to string ID types
Replace Set<number> and number-based ID fields with Set<string> and string fields
Ensure service method signatures and internal caches compile with updated DTO types
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update cards pages for string ID routing and actions
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I want cards page logic to stop numeric ID parsing so UI actions work with string business IDs.
acceptanceCriteria: Update apps/web/src/pages/cards/** to remove parseInt/Number usage for deckId/noteId/cardId
Update route param handling and event handlers to pass string IDs directly
Selection and expansion state uses string IDs consistently
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add and update tests for string-ID migration behavior
userStories.description: As a QA-focused developer, I want automated tests covering string-ID flows so regressions are detected before merge.
acceptanceCriteria: Add or update backend unit/integration tests for note/deck/study/import/export paths using string business IDs
Add or update tests that cover ID generation and relation integrity for migrated schema contracts
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Run mandatory migration quality gates
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I want mandatory quality gate commands to pass so the Big Bang migration is safe to merge.
acceptanceCriteria: Run pnpm --filter @echoe/server test with exit code 0
Run pnpm --filter @echoe/dto test with exit code 0
Run pnpm lint with exit code 0
Run pnpm --filter @echoe/server typecheck, pnpm --filter @echoe/web typecheck, and pnpm --filter @echoe/dto typecheck with exit code 0
Typecheck passes
